confidence: High on envelope/areas/counts (assessor-verified and internally reconciled to the exact 1,976 sq ft living area); medium on interior room placement (corroborated by the archived MLS remarks + owner facts); low on individual interior room dimensions (no published room-by-room measurements exist — all interior dims are inferred from the verified envelope and marked as such).

Overall a rectangle-plus-deck / slight-L outline. (VERIFIED — assessor footprint sketch.)

verifiedVsInferred: VERIFIED (assessor record card, internally reconciled): 2-story Colonial; built 1992; 1,976 sq ft finished living area; 26x38 (988 sq ft) footprint = 24x38 main block ('2S FR+') + 2x38 strip ('2S FR-'); 912 sq ft full unfinished walkout basement; 2 tuck-under (basement) garage bays; 12x16 (192 sq ft) wood deck; 8 total rooms; 4 bedrooms; 2 full + 1 half bath; 1 kitchen; 1 fireplace; wood frame; clapboard siding; asphalt roof; hot-water/oil heat; 0% cooling (no central AC on record); 1.59-acre R-40 lot. The 988 x 2 = 1,976 and 912 basement = main-block footprint reconciliations are exact.

VERIFIED-CONSISTENT GEOMETRY (assessor sketch + owner facts agree): the main-floor kitchen sits over the 912 sq ft tuck-under-garage level; the deck (192 sq ft) attaches to the right/rear; the chimney/fireplace aligns with the 2-ft '2S FR-' side strip.

CORROBORATED (archived 2019 MLS #170206327 remarks, recovered via search extraction; direct Trulia/Redfin/Realtor pages were 403-blocked): main floor = eat-in kitchen opening to family room with fireplace, separate formal living + dining rooms, first-floor half bath, French doors to deck; upper floor = front-to-back master suite (own bath + walk-in closet) plus 3 more bedrooms and a full hall bath; lower level = unfinished walkout with laundry.

OWNER-CONFIRMED (ground truth, honored in program): kitchen is on the main floor directly over the tuck-under garage; an unused room sits on the main level next to the kitchen (most consistent with the formal living room or dining room).

INFERRED (NOT in any record — derived from the verified envelope): all interior room-by-room DIMENSIONS; the exact subdivision of the 988 sq ft per floor into rooms; garage bay sizing; foyer/stair and upper-hall circulation; roof SHAPE (gable assumed from colonial form); garage-door facing direction; foundation material.

UNKNOWN / unverifiable from public sources: every interior dimension (no room measurements published anywhere); presence/absence of central air (not in remarks; assessor shows 0% cooling = none on record); exact garage-door orientation; gable-vs-hip roof; whether the '2S FR-' strip is a chimney chase, stair, or bay window.
whatWouldMakeItExact: The assessor BUILDING SKETCH image itself (embedded base64 PNG on propertyrecordcards.com PrintPage for uniqueid 32090751) at full resolution — it carries the exterior sub-area dimensions and the precise outline of the 2-ft strip and deck attachment point; reading it pixel-accurate would fix the exterior geometry and the deck/strip placement exactly.

The original MLS #170206327 (SmartMLS/CT) listing's room dimensions table and any floor-plan graphic — the public remarks were recovered but the room-by-room measurement table and a floor plan (Movoto advertised '34 Photos') were never exposed; obtaining the full SmartMLS sheet would give real per-room dimensions.

Owner-supplied measurements / a tape survey of the four upstairs bedrooms, the kitchen, family room, living and dining rooms, and the two-bay garage — this is the only way to turn the inferred interior dimensions into exact ones.

The 1992 original building permit / construction drawings on file with the Simsbury building department (none listed on the assessor card) — would give the true interior partition layout, stair locations, and garage-bay dimensions.

A leaf-off aerial or a Simsbury GIS/AxisGIS building-footprint polygon (the JS map viewers could not be rendered by the fetch tool) — would confirm garage-door facing direction and roof shape (gable vs hip) that tree canopy currently obscures.
layoutCues: Main mass is a true colonial box: 24 ft front width x 38 ft deep, two full stories stacked over a 912 sq ft basement.
Place the kitchen at the lower/rear-right of the main floor directly over the tuck-under garage bays (owner-confirmed); the eat-in kitchen opens into the fireplace family room.
Put the 'unused room' (formal living or dining) immediately adjacent to the kitchen on the main level.
Fireplace/chimney aligns with the 2-ft full-depth '2S FR-' strip on the right side — a logical chimney chase location.
Deck (12x16) attaches off the right/rear via French doors, off the casual kitchen/family-room zone.
All four bedrooms and both full baths are upstairs; the master is front-to-back (full 38 ft depth direction) with ensuite bath + walk-in closet.
Garage doors face the downhill/driveway (front) side; the lower level is a walkout, so the basement opens at grade on the downhill side.
Half bath is on the main floor; no central AC on the assessor record.
